name: POLICY-BACKLOG-2
title: Specify WHERE owner/version/deprecation_criterion metadata lives
description: spec-rules.md section 3 'Lifecycle and Ownership' requires every artifact to record Owner, Version, and Deprecation criterion at creation time. But it does not specify WHERE these go: feature.json? frontmatter? source comments? README? The repo currently uses a mix: feature.json (machine-first), spec.md frontmatter (also machine-readable), and inline comments in scripts (e.g., test-POLICY-1-no-stale-imports.py has 'Owner:' and 'Deprecation criterion:' in header comments). Policy should declare the canonical location or mandate consistency. Location: .claude/features/policy/spec-rules.md section 3, lines 45-55.
